dim6_q01.baseline:
[ANSWER]
(a) 12
(b) 14
(c) 6
[/ANSWER]

[REASONING]
Rectangle 4×3: A = 4·3 = 12. B = 2·(4+3) = 14 (perimeter lattice points). I = A − B/2 + 1 = 12 − 7 + 1 = 6.
[/REASONING]

dim6_q02.baseline:
[ANSWER]
(a) 12
(b) 12
(c) 7
[/ANSWER]

[REASONING]
Right triangle (0,0)(6,0)(0,4): A = 6·4/2 = 12. Boundary points: edge gcds 6, 4, gcd(6,4)=2 ⇒ B = 6+4+2 = 12. I = 12 − 6 + 1 = 7.
[/REASONING]

dim6_q03.baseline:
[ANSWER]
(a) 12
(b) 16
(c) 5
[/ANSWER]

[REASONING]
L-shape = 4×4 square minus 2×2 corner ⇒ A = 16 − 4 = 12. Edge gcds: 4+2+2+2+2+4 = 16 ⇒ B=16. I = 12 − 8 + 1 = 5.
[/REASONING]

[ANSWER]
(a) 18
(b) 12
(c) 13

[REASONING]

[/REASONING]

[/REASONING]
